title: 001199 with n_ens32 for both RealMLP seeds
summary: Apply n_ens=32 to both RealMLP seeds inside the 001199 CatBoost-corrected system.
rationale: The current best parent is 001199 with CV 0.9544491320 and public 0.95409. This hypothesis is an atomic child patch intended to exploit the confirmed two-seed RealMLP core plus low-weight CatBoost correction direction.
implementation_hint: Start from 001199. Keep the same two RealMLP seeds and CatBoost correction, but set n_ens=32 for both RealMLP experts. Do not change CatBoost weight, folds, features, or calibration behavior unless required by runtime.
expected_effect: Combine two confirmed signals: RealMLP variance reduction and low-weight CatBoost correction.
risk: Runtime increases and n_ens32 may overfit local CV relative to public.
